--//
Content-Type: application/node.eks.aws

---
apiVersion: node.eks.aws/v1alpha1
kind: NodeConfig
spec:
  cluster:
    apiServerEndpoint: https://C080494B575C8B184F9EC25E14EF9126.gr7.eu-north-1.eks.amazonaws.com
    certificateAuthority: 
    cidr: 172.20.0.0/16
    name: bb-eks-gitops
  kubelet:
    config:
      maxPods: 98
      clusterDNS:
      - 172.20.0.10
    flags:
    - "--node-labels=eks.amazonaws.com/nodegroup-image=ami-011bf62e6a9f5a429,eks.amazonaws.com/sourceLaunchTemplateVersion=1,eks.amazonaws.com/capacityType=ON_DEMAND,eks.amazonaws.com/nodegroup=default,eks.amazonaws.com/sourceLaunchTemplateId=lt-02cdfe144fef38cdc"

ami.description: The AMI ID used to launch the EC2 instance.

arn.description: The ARN of the EC2 instance.

availability_zone.description: The availability zone in which the EC2 instance is running.

host_id.description: The ID of the dedicated host the instance is running on, if applicable.

iam_instance_profile.description: The IAM instance profile ARN or name attached to the instance.

id.description: The ID of the EC2 instance.

instance_state.description: The state of the EC2 instance. For example, 'pending', 'running', 'shutting-down', 'terminated', 'stopping', 'stopped'.

instance_type.description: The instance type of the EC2 instance.

ipv6_addresses.description: A list of IPv6 addresses assigned to the instance's primary network interface.

key_name.description: The name of the key pair used to launch the instance.

placement_group.description: The name of the placement group the instance is in.

primary_network_interface_id.description: The ID of the primary network interface attached to the instance.

private_dns.description: The private DNS name assigned to the EC2 instance.

private_ip.description: The private IP address assigned to the EC2 instance.

public_dns.description: The public DNS name assigned to the EC2 instance, if applicable.

public_ip.description: The public IP address assigned to the EC2 instance, if applicable.

subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet in which the EC2 instance is running.

tags_all.description: A map of all tags assigned to the instance, including default tags.

vpc_security_group_ids.description: A list of security group IDs associated with the EC2 instance.
